overview: CharlieSierra is a fully decentralized, end-to-end encrypted secure messaging platform built on the Internet Computer. Designed for government and enterprise use, it features minimalist high-contrast UI, WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility, multi-device key sync via QR pairing, full-text message search, and a community/group discovery system with admin approval workflows — all while maintaining zero-knowledge encrypted messaging.
features: End-to-end encrypted 1:1 and group chats with AES-GCM + ECDH
Read receipts, typing indicators, disappearing messages
File, image, video, voice note sharing
Enterprise admin controls: audit logs, key escrow, retention metadata
Offline message queuing with priority messaging and auto-failover
WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility with high-contrast professional theme
Multi-device key sync via QR code pairing
Community/group discovery with join requests and admin approval workflows
